title: Resources | Global Immigration | Houston & Austin, TX | Foster LLP
content:
## Our Global Immigration Law Firm Can Provide Additional Resources to Meet Your Needs
At Foster LLP, our team understands that immigration policies and procedures can be complex. With that in mind, our dedicated immigration law firm has collected a number of important resources and tools to help our clients quickly navigate and identify immigration information that may be useful in their case. These resources were gathered to provide valuable up-to-the-minute information about current immigration procedures and processes, as well as any foreseeable changes. Whether you are researching passport or visa requirements, green card application requirements, or simply inquiring about visa processing times, we invite you to browse the provided links on this page for updates.
If you have specific questions or are seeking the representation of an immigration lawyer, contact Foster LLP today to request a consult. We proudly serve the Houston , Austin , and Dallas , TX areas.
- USCIS Processing Times
- Visa Appointment Wait Times
- CBP I-94 Arrival/Departure Record
- Form AR-11 Change of Address
- Write Your Congressman
- Other Government Websites
